# Compliance Checklist: DTF工资追踪器 MVP

**Purpose**: Requirements-quality gate for payroll compliance, OCR, and salary-tracking scope within the MVP feature.
**Created**: 2025-11-06
**Feature**: [/home/yueka/projects/AI-CODE-PROJECTS/DTFOverTime/specs/001-dtf-salary-tracker-mvp/spec.md](/home/yueka/projects/AI-CODE-PROJECTS/DTFOverTime/specs/001-dtf-salary-tracker-mvp/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by `/speckit.checklist` and treats requirements as the unit-under-test.

## Requirement Completeness

- [✅] CHK001 Are image quality, file format, and submission channel requirements explicitly defined to uphold the 10s SLA and ≥90% OCR accuracy targets? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001; Spec §FR-002; Spec §SC-001]
- [✅] CHK002 Does the spec enumerate every schedule status (work/rest/off/AL/support/training/unknown) and describe how each maps into compliant payroll rules? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003; Spec §FR-022]
- [✅] CHK003 Are retention and traceability requirements defined for original schedule files and subsequent manual edits/re-imports? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008; Spec §FR-009]
- [✅] CHK004 Are audit trail requirements captured for payroll-impacting data changes (imports, punch edits, MC updates) with actor, timestamp, and before/after values as mandated by “最小可行合规”? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications – Session 2025-11-05]

## Requirement Clarity

- [✅] CHK005 Is “识别准确率 ≥90%” defined with the calculation method (per-cell vs per-schedule) and sampling rules to remove ambiguity? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006; Spec §SC-001]
- [✅] CHK006 Does the dynamic日薪公式 specify handling for partial weeks, PH exclusions, and rounding so payroll outputs are reproducible? [Clarity, Spec §FR-027b; Spec §Appendix B]
- [✅] CHK007 Are the heuristics and override rules for自动标记法定Rest Day documented with precise thresholds and conflict resolution steps? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010a]

## Requirement Consistency

- [✅] CHK008 Do auto-filled打卡字段 remain synchronized with user corrections so FR-017 never contradicts FR-008 edits to the schedule? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008; Spec §FR-017]
- [✅] CHK009 Are offline cached views required to refresh or flag stale data after salary-affecting edits to prevent mismatched compliance records? [Consistency, Spec §FR-046; Spec §FR-025]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [✅] CHK010 Are measurement procedures defined for SC-007/SC-008 to prove工资预估准确率≥99% and <1秒刷新 across rest-day, PH, and MC scenarios? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-007; Spec §SC-008]
- [✅] CHK011 Is SC-004’s “<30秒”打卡体验 tied to observable telemetry or usability-test protocols so pass/fail is objective? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario Coverage

- [✅] CHK012 Do requirements cover the journey where repeated OCR failures trigger manual entry, including confirmation, partial data reuse, and audit capture? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §User Story 1; Spec §FR-007]
- [✅] CHK013 Are flows defined for employees exceeding MOM Part IV salary门槛 (禁用OT) covering UI messaging, restricted calculations, and compliance-mode re-entry? [Scenario Coverage, Spec §Clarifications – MOM Part IV; Spec §Assumptions]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [✅] CHK014 Are half-day thresholds and initiatedBy parameters for休息日薪资（雇主/员工要求）fully specified for both compliance math and user feedback? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §Clarifications – Rest Day拆分; Spec §FR-022]
- [✅] CHK015 Are PH computations aligned with configurable正常工时并覆盖培训日或混合班次与PH重叠时的处理? [Edge Case Coverage, Spec §Clarifications – 公眾假期計薪; Spec §FR-022]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [✅] CHK016 Is monitoring/alerting defined to enforce the <10s OCR SLA and trigger fallbacks when latency or accuracy drifts? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-002; Spec §SC-002; Plan §Performance Goals]
- [✅] CHK017 Do requirements codify PDPA data residency, encryption, and retention expectations instead of leaving them as assumptions? [Non-Functional, Plan §Constraints; Spec §Assumptions – Data Security]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [✅] CHK018 Are GPT-4 Vision and Tesseract fallback dependencies documented with readiness criteria, rate limits, and failover triggers protecting OCR guarantees? [Dependencies, Plan §Technical Context; Spec §SC-001]
- [✅] CHK019 Have user-behavior assumptions (daily打卡、愿意修正OCR错误) been converted into reminders or research validation checkpoints? [Dependencies, Spec §Assumptions – User Behavior]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [✅] CHK020 Is FR-034’s“导出工资单” reconciled with the clarified scope exclusion of报表/导出功能 for this MVP iteration? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-034; Clarification Q1]
- [✅] CHK021 When compliance scope is deferred, does the spec mandate documented风控/法务签字与“后续优先级跟进”记录 per Clarification Q2? [Ambiguity, Clarification Q2]
